song_name: Mountain With A View - Stick Season
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]

[ch]A[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab]     [ch]A[/ch]
It's 7 a.m. and I'm on a mountain with a view[/tab]
[tab] [ch]D[/ch]
I'm the only one alone at a table meant for two[/tab]
[tab] [ch]A[/ch]
Big Sur looks beautiful this morning[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]D[/ch]
And I should be missing you, I should be missing you[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab] [ch]A[/ch]
You're across the pond at a show, I think in Amsterdam[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]
And the pictures look pretty, at least they do on your Instagram[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
We say good morning, then good night[/tab]
[tab]                                  [ch]D[/ch]
I wonder if you even know where I am, where I am[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]                 [ch]A[/ch]
I'm wearing the ring still, but I think I'm lying[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]D[/ch]
Sometimes you forget yours, I think we're done trying[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]F#m[/ch]                             [ch]D[/ch]
I realize you loved me, much more at twenty-three[/tab]
[tab]                                            [ch]A[/ch]
I think that this is where its over for me[/tab]

[Break]
[tab]                                      [ch]D[/ch]
I think that this is where I cut the ties[/tab]
[tab]                                         [ch]F#m[/ch]
I think that this is where I set myself free[/tab]
[tab]                                          [ch]D[/ch]
One day you'll ask "When was it over for you?"[/tab]

[Verse 3]
[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]
As you promised me that I was more than all the miles combined[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]E[/ch]
You must've, had yourself a change of heart like halfway through the drive[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]F#m[/ch]
Because your voice trailed off exactly as you passed my exit sign[/tab]
[tab] [ch]D[/ch]
Kept on driving straight and left our future to the right[/tab]

[Verse 4]
[tab]           [ch]A[/ch]
Now I am, stuck between my anger and the blame that I can't face[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]E[/ch]
And memories are something even smoking weed does not replace[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F#m[/ch]
And I am terrified of weather, because I see you when it rains[/tab]
[tab] [ch]D[/ch]
Doc told me to travel but theres COVID on the planes[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]
And I, love Vermont but it's the season of the sticks and I,[/tab]
[tab] [ch]E[/ch]
Saw your mom, she forgot that I existed and its,[/tab]
[tab] [ch]F#m[/ch]
Half my fault, but I just like to play the victim[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]D[/ch]
I'll drink alcohol, 'till my friends come home for Christmas[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]A[/ch]
And I'll dream each night of some version of you[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]E[/ch]
That I might not have but I did not lose[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F#m[/ch]
Now you're tire tracks and one pair of shoes[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]                         [ch]E[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]
And I'm split in half but that'll have to do[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab]                         [ch]A[/ch]
Scream I'm just like my parents, and giving up easy[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]D[/ch]
But you never took that last flight to see me[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]F#m[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
Looks like our ending ain't ending happily[/tab]
[tab]                                       [ch]A[/ch]
I think that this is when its over for me, meee[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]E[/ch]
Oh that'll have to do[/tab]

(I can't handle another year of you and I just being fine)
[tab]                   [ch]F#m[/ch]
My other half was you[/tab]

(I've shared all my secrets and I've paid for all my crimes)
[tab]                        [ch]D[/ch]                      [ch]E[/ch]
I hope this pains just passing through, but I doubt it[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]       [ch]A[/ch]
And I love Vermont but it's the season of the sticks and I[/tab]
[tab] [ch]E[/ch]
Saw your mom, she forgot that I existed and it's[/tab]
[tab] [ch]F#m[/ch]
Half my fault but I just like to play the victim[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]D[/ch]
I'll drink alcohol 'till my friends come home for Christmas[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]A[/ch]
And I'll dream each night of some version of you[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]E[/ch]
That I might not have but I did not lose[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F#m[/ch]
Now you're tire tracks and one pair of shoes[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]                         [ch]E[/ch]
And I'm split in half but that'll have to do,[/tab]

[Outro]
[tab]                                                              [ch]A[/ch]
(Half to do), half to do, I think this is when it's over for me[/tab]

************************************
